standard: DM 5/11/2001 n.6792 Norme funzionali e geometriche
notes: Official MIT PDF, full decree + technical-norms ANNEX (design speed, raggio minimo, pendenza, clotoide pp.69-77, rettifilo). AMENDED by DM 22/04/2004 n.67/S — amendment PDF also in this folder as ITA_DM-67S-2004-amendment.pdf (2pp, from Gazzetta Ufficiale n.147/2004; redefines campo di applicazione + adds mandatory safety analysis); full GU issue retained as ITA_GU-147-2004_full-issue_source.pdf (provenance). Intersections are NOT in this decree — see free/ITA_DM-intersezioni-2006/.
